# LIQUE Miami
Waterfront restaurant and lounge

> LIQUE Miami is a premium waterfront restaurant and lounge offering refined dining, craft cocktails, and a vibrant evening atmosphere in North Miami Beach.

## Business Details

- **Name:** LIQUE Miami
- **Type:** Waterfront restaurant and lounge
- **Address:** 3957 NE 163rd St, North Miami Beach, FL 33160
- **Phone:** +1-305-705-2425

## Site Structure

- **/** (Homepage)
- **/#about** (About the venue)
- **/#menu** (Restaurant menu)
- **/#reviews** (Guest reviews)
- **/#contact** (Contact and reservations)

## Keywords

- Lique Miami
- Miami waterfront restaurant
- North Miami Beach restaurant
- Luxury dining Miami
- Miami waterfront lounge
